improvements: Replaced the flaky popup click-path with a deterministic modelMenu state switch before spending the live submit.
Captured the exact failure boundary: the UI accepted the Cyrillic prompt and entered smart execution, but the route never produced a captured response within the batch window.

notes: Selection before submit was smart/claude-sonnet-4-6 and the UI showed the Cyrillic prompt correctly.

The live submit consumed quota, but the harness never observed a completed /api/v1/smart response; server-side evidence showed smart browser execution flapping between 60s timeouts and one intermediate extracted response.

error: SMART live submit consumed quota, but the request never yielded a captured /api/v1/smart response inside the batch window. Acceptance criteria were not met, so no retry was allowed and the batch stopped after SMART.
